page: Microsoft Azure E64ds_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Edsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor on the x86_64 architecture, with hyper-threading enabled. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. For local storage, it includes a 3780 GB local disk and supports Premium Storage.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong capabilities across compute and memory subsystems. The Intel Xeon processor delivers top-tier performance in PassMark CPU tests and single-threaded gzip compression. The CPU architecture supports advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), which contribute to strong performance in LLM prompt processing and cryptographic operations. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, reaching up to 5421.5 GB/sec for cached small-block reads and 332.26 GB/sec for uncached large-block reads.

The server demonstrates high resource density and qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive workloads that do not require dedicated GPU hardware. It achieves top-tier results in database operations and static web serving throughput, alongside strong Redis SET performance. These characteristics make the E64ds_v7 highly suitable for large-scale relational databases, in-memory caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and data-dense ETL pipelines.
description: Microsoft Azure E64ds_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor with 64 dedicated vCPUs and 32 physical cores. It features 512.0 GB of RAM, offering a high 8.0 GB per vCPU ratio, alongside a 3780 GB local disk with Premium Storage capability. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this x86_64 server delivers top-tier performance in database operations, static web serving, and single-threaded compression. The processor includes AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), driving strong cryptographic and vector processing capabilities. While lacking a GPU, its massive memory capacity and high memory bandwidth make it qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy workloads. It is highly suited for large databases, in-memory data stores like Redis, and complex ETL pipelines.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64ds_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 64 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and a 3780 GB local disk, delivering top-tier performance for databases and memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E64ds_v7 is a memory-optimized VM with 64 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage, built for database and enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized platform with local storage, engineered for demanding database operations and enterprise data processing.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 512.0 GB of RAM for memory-intensive workloads
3780 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier performance in database operations and static web serving
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated vector and matrix operations
Optimized for large-scale relational databases, Redis caching, and ETL pipelines
